name: Christmas Hard Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 2 cups of sugar, 1/2 cup white Karo syrup, and 1/2 cup water in a saucepan.
2. Heat the mixture over medium-high heat until it reaches a temperature of 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Remove from heat and carefully stir in 1 teaspoon of cinnamon oil. Other flavor oils can be used to create different colored candies.
4. Pour the mixture into a candy mold or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Allow the candy to cool completely before removing it from the mold.
